name: Egg & Sausage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the crusts from the bread slices.
2. Place the bread in a 13x9 inch Pyrex dish.
3. Cook the sausage until it is browned on all sides.
4. Drain the sausage on paper towels to remove excess fat.
5. Arrange the sausage over the bread slices.
6. Sprinkle the grated cheese evenly over the sausage.
7. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, 1/2 cup milk, and dry mustard until well combined.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the cheese.
9. Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 24 hours.
10. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
11. Stir together the cream of mushroom soup and 1 1/2 cups milk in a separate bowl.
12. Pour the soup mixture evenly over the casserole.
13. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 1/2 hours, or until set and golden brown on top.
14. The dish can be frozen before baking if desired.
